reopened.reason: Group reaction remove path uses applyOptimistic with a fresh UUID and removed:true, inserting a tombstone instead of flipping the existing add row. Same shape as DM bug fixed in commit 18dd1ca; never replicated to ChatStoreContext.tsx. Breaks AC-40 (remove half), AC-56 (own-reaction badge removal), and the group side of AC-59 (rollback). Failing tests: app/tests/e2e/groups-reactions.spec.ts:197 and :302.

phase_history.trigger: story-03-dm-transport verified accepted (4 rounds: 1 thread isolation, 1 seal verification + sender binding, 1 rumor id validation)
story-04-rumor-builder verified accepted (2 rounds: defensive validation for emoji='-' on add path and empty-string targetAuthorPubkey)
story-05-compose-picker verified accepted (3 rounds: focus management + reversed-selection edge cases + Framer Motion fix on close)
story-06-group-reactions verified accepted (1 round; carries known followup: leaf-module fix in story-07)
story-07-dm-reactions verified accepted (2 rounds: leaf-module fix + ChatStoreContext second-path gate + DM gate ref hardening; DM kind-1059 e2e harness gap deferred to story-08)
story-08-reaction-ui verified accepted (2 rounds: UI implementation + Framer Motion close regression fix on both pickers); epic complete.

Post-merge e2e iteration surfaced deterministic failures at groups-reactions.spec.ts:197 and :302. Group sendReaction remove path was never updated with applyOptimisticRemoval (story-07 helper). Story-08 verifier closed AC-56 without ground-truthing the group remove flow.
